4 min read
Just now

--

Helping students improve their resumes before applying using AI-powered ATS analysis, recruiter insights, skill gap detection, and self-correcting document parsing.Introduction
Every year, thousands of students apply for internships and jobs without knowing whether their resumes actually match the requirements of the position. Many resumes are rejected by Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) before a recruiter even reads them, leaving candidates unaware of what went wrong or how to improve.
To address this challenge, I built InternTrack Insight, an AI-powered Resume Intelligence Platform that analyses resumes against job descriptions and provides detailed, actionable feedback before candidates submit their applications.
The objective of this project is not only to calculate an ATS score but also to explain why a resume may be rejected and guide users toward meaningful improvements.
The Problem
Most resume evaluation tools only provide a numerical ATS score or perform basic keyword matching. They rarely explain the reasoning behind the score or provide personalised recommendations.
Students often struggle to understand:

• Which technical skills are missing

• Why recruiters may reject their resumes

• How well their resume matches a specific job description

• What improvements should be made before applying

• How to prepare for interviews after improving their resume
InternTrack Insight was built to solve these problems through AI-driven resume intelligence.
Solution Overview
InternTrack Insight compares a candidate’s resume with a target job description using AI-powered analysis.
The platform evaluates multiple aspects of the resume and generates an intelligent report containing both quantitative scores and qualitative recommendations.
Instead of simply telling users whether their resume is “good” or “bad,” the system explains exactly what needs improvement.
Key Features
ATS Match Score
Calculates an overall compatibility score between the resume and the target job description.
AI Recruiter Review
Generates recruiter-style feedback explaining how an actual recruiter might evaluate the candidate.
Resume Score Breakdown
Provides a detailed breakdown based on:

• Skills

• Experience

• Projects

• Education

• Certifications

• Formatting
Skill Matching
Identifies both:

• Skills already matching the job description

• Missing technical skills that should be learned
Resume Improvement Suggestions
Generates personalised recommendations to strengthen the resume before applying.
AI Interview Questions
Creates interview questions tailored to the uploaded resume and selected job description.
Career Roadmap
Produces a personalised roadmap helping students improve their profiles over the coming weeks.
Downloadable AI Report
Generates a professional PDF report containing all analysis results.
Self-Correcting AI Workflow
One of the most interesting aspects of InternTrack Insight is its self-correcting parsing workflow inspired by Hindsight.
Resume parsing can fail because of unusual PDF structures, formatting inconsistencies, or extraction errors.
Instead of simply displaying an error, the system:

• Records the parsing failure

• Stores the error in MongoDB

• Remembers previous recovery strategies

• Automatically activates fallback parsing

• Continues the resume analysis whenever possible
This makes the platform significantly more robust when working with real-world resumes.
Technology Stack
Frontend

• React.js
Backend

• Node.js

• Express.js
Database

• MongoDB
AI Integration

• Gemini AI
Additional Technologies

• JavaScript

• PDF Parsing

• OCR

• Multer
Challenges Faced
Developing this project within a limited hackathon timeline required solving several technical challenges, including:

• Resume parsing from different document formats

• AI prompt engineering

• ATS scoring logic

• Skill extraction

• Job description parsing

• Error recovery

• Database integration

• PDF report generation
Each challenge contributed significantly to my understanding of full-stack AI application development.
Future Enhancements
InternTrack Insight will continue evolving with several upcoming features, including:

• AI Resume Rewrite

• AI Mock Interview Agent

• Personalised AI Career Mentor

• Company-specific ATS Optimisation

• Internship & Job Recommendation Engine

• Recruiter Dashboard

• Resume Version Tracking

• Performance Analytics
Conclusion
Building InternTrack Insight has been an incredible learning experience.
The project strengthened my understanding of full-stack development, AI integration, document processing, backend architecture, and intelligent error handling.
More importantly, it demonstrated how AI can be used to solve a practical problem faced by students during internship and job applications.
I look forward to continuing the development of InternTrack Insight and expanding it into a more comprehensive AI-powered career guidance platform.
GitHub Repository
https://github.com/mousalivaishnavi20/InternTrack-Insight
